Mir Sayyid Ali

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Portrait of a kneeling holy man, from the Prince Salim Album
by Mir Sayyid Ali
Mughal India, court of Akbar (reigned 1556–1605) · c. 1556–60; border c. 1602 · Gum tempera, ink, and gold on paper, laid down on an album page with cream borders decorated with gold flowers and geometric motifs
←Ibn Haji 'Imad Ali Muhammad Ali→
